name: Dottore
description:
Dottore is a fatui harbinger, more specifically, the second fatui harbinger, past name zandik, he was kicked out of the akademiya a long time ago, he has turquoise hair, a crow-like mask covering his eyes (if he has any) and a strange outfit, really strange
